text.title: Claude Advanced Features Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure to pick and wire in the advanced Claude feature(s) for a given workload. Steps may not be reordered without an explicit deviation note.

step.name: Profile the workload.
step.description: Input: workload description. Action: capture latency budget, call volume per session, prefix stability flag, reasoning-trace requirement, GUI-only requirement. Output: workload profile row.

step.name: Decide feature set against the decision tree.
step.description: Input: workload profile. Action: walk `content/06-decision-tree.xml` from the root question; collect zero or more of {extended_thinking, prompt_caching, batch_api, computer_use}. Output: features_enabled list.

step.name: Configure Extended Thinking when selected.
step.description: Input: features_enabled. Action: start with `budget_tokens=5000`; set `max_tokens=budget+4096`; remove `temperature`; if streaming is required, wire `thinking_delta` → trace buffer. Output: `extended_thinking` config block.

step.name: Configure Prompt Caching when selected.
step.description: Input: features_enabled + system prompt draft. Action: reorder system prompt so stable content leads, mark with `cache_control:{"type":"ephemeral"}`, verify cached prefix ≥1024 tokens, sink `usage.cache_read_input_tokens` into the cost log. Output: `prompt_caching` config block + cached system array.
step.note: Step 4. Required input: system prompt draft.

step.name: Configure Batch API or Computer Use when selected.
step.description: Input: features_enabled. Action (batch): set `poll_interval_seconds >= 60`, set `custom_id` = primary key, plan an errored-resubmit queue. Action (computer-use): pin to a sandboxed VM, set `MAX_ITER`, set per-action timeout, wire a human-escalation hook. Output: `batch_api` and/or `computer_use` config block.

step.name: Validate.
step.description: Input: assembled output JSON. Action: run `scripts/validate-claude-advanced-features.py` against it; for prompt caching also run a 10-call smoke test and assert `cache_hit_ratio > 0.70` on the last 9. Output: green validator + smoke metric.
